details: The agent ran appropriate kubectl-axi commands (deploy list, deploy view, pods, events) that provided real cluster evidence, then correctly reported both required elements: (1) the rollout state — ProgressDeadlineExceeded with only 1 new pod created while 3 old v1 pods continue serving traffic, and (2) the root cause — the invalid image nginx:2.0-does-not-exist causing ImagePullBackOff on the new pod, preventing rollout progression.
